events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario involves EMT bending & installation on a commercial project. The observed field condition is "missing support within 3 ft of box." The work is in-progress.

NEC Article 358 covers EMT. Section 358.30(B) requires supports within 3 feet of each box, cabinet, or fitting. So missing support within 3 ft of a box is a code violation.

This is a sequence/procedure check. The work is in-progress and there's a non-compliant condition: missing support within 3 ft of box. This is an installed-defective condition.

Decision: fail (non-compliant)
Risk: medium (could lead to conduit damage/movement, but not immediately dangerous)
Work stage: in-progress
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: maybe 60% (in-progress EMT bending/installation)
Findings: missing support within 3 ft of box violates NEC 358.30(B)
Actions: install required support within 3 ft of box before continuing
References: NEC Art. 358.30(B)

Let me writethe JSON.
